text:
@dir /prefix


the problem lies in the @ which is in unicode a a HEX which feteches the previous line by use of the ascii 20 which is space the way a line ends is CR,LF,CRLF,or NULL and by a hexeditor you should see the issue, as the syslog know in BSD,IETF,CE, all sends "source 0.0.0    "0.message ........"
